name: Shree Digvijay Cement Company Ltd.
summary: Shree Digvijay Cement Company Ltd. manufactures and sells cement in India. The company's products include ordinary Portland cement, Portland Pozzolana cement, sulphate resisting Portland cement, oil well cement, and other cements. It sell its products under the KAMAL CEMENT and CEMENT KA SARDAR brands. The company was founded in 1942 and is based in Jamnagar, India. Shree Digvijay Cement Company Ltd. is a subsidiary of True North Fund VI LLP.
